requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a small wooden bedside table or desk. Use one adult hand as the only moving person or hand. A a single closed paperback book is nearby. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A compact portable LED lamp, matching the reference image, sits turned off on a light wooden bedside table next to a single closed paperback book. The background is a plain warm‑gray wall. The room has dim, cozy ambient light so the lamp and book are clearly visible but there is no glow yet. The camera is locked and steady at a slightly high angle, showing the lamp and book on the tabletop in one composition. After a brief beat, an adult right hand wearing a light gray long‑sleeve sweater enters from the right, gently lifts the lamp for a moment to show its small one‑hand size, then sets it back down close to the book. The hand gives a gentle tap to the top. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A compact portable LED lamp, matching the reference image, sits turned off on a light wooden bedside table next to a single closed paperback book. The background is a plain warm‑gray wall. The room has dim, cozy ambient light so the lamp and book are clearly visible but there is no glow yet. The camera is locked and steady at a slightly high angle, showing the lamp and book on the tabletop in one composition. After a brief beat, an adult right hand wearing a light gray long‑sleeve sweater enters from the right, gently lifts the lamp for a moment to show its small one‑hand size, then sets it back down close to the book. The hand gives a gentle tap to the top of the lamp; the lamp turns on and a soft, warm pool of light blooms outward across the wood surface and washes over the book cover. The hand slowly rotates the lamp a few degrees to show the cozy glow, then releases and exits the frame. Hold for a moment on the warmly lit book and glowing lamp in the calm bedside scene.
requests.overlay_text: Soft warm light. Easy to carry.
requests.audio_direction: Quiet lo‑fi instrumental bed. Subtle tap click when the lamp is touched, followed by a gentle warm chime swell as the light turns on; fade under by the end.
